title: Grounded open-question answer with evidence-based refusal
question: 根据青岛港国际股份有限公司2019年的年报数据，能否简要介绍公司报告期内破产重整相关事项的详情。
answer: 年报片段中未明确披露。

evidence.content: 九、破产重整相关事项 □适用 √不适用
4、信托目的已实现或者无法实现； 终止的条件 5、本信托被撤销；

notes: This sample is useful in interviews because it shows the system refusing to hallucinate details when the retrieved evidence does not support a richer answer.
